articles.title: Local factors insulate private credit market from global storm
articles.description: India's private credit market is expected to remain stable, unlike its global counterparts, due to a robust regulatory framework and a predominantly domestic investor base. Restrictions on bank investments in AIFs further insulate the Indian ecosystem from systemic risks.

articles.title: Close shave for Farooq Abdullah: Wanted to kill former J&K CM for 20 years, gunman tells cops
articles.description: A gunman attempted to kill Farooq Abdullah, former Jammu and Kashmir Chief Minister, at a wedding. The shooter, Kamal Singh Jamwal, claimed to have planned the attack for 20 years. Police ruled out terrorism, noting he appeared intoxicated during the incident.

articles.title: Trump launches a sudden tirade against Gavin Newsom, lashes out at him for being Dyslexic
articles.description: Earlier in Kentucky, Trump spent a long stretch of his speech mocking Newsom for publicly talking about his dyslexia, saying, “I don’t want the president of the United States to have a cognitive deficiency.”

articles.title: Did Iran conspire a ‘surprise attack’ in California? What we know about FBI alert amid Trump's Operation Epic Fury

dailyNews.description: Some Senate Democrats and industry groups oppose an institutional investor ban in a housing bill, arguing the provision would eliminate build-to-rent units and reduce rentals.

dailyNews.description: The U.S. strikes on Iran contradict President Donald Trump's 2024 campaign pledge to avoid wars, podcast host Joe Rogan said Tuesday while discussing the conflict.

dailyNews.title: Trump administration puts key Biden-era immigration policy on notice: 'Unsustainable cycle'
dailyNews.description: The Trump administration is looking to undo temporary protected status designations for hundreds of thousands of migrants in the U.S., which would reverse a key Biden-era policy.

dailyNews.title: Newsom knocked for ‘insane’ California gas prices after blaming Trump for rising costs
dailyNews.description: Critics are calling out California Gov. Gavin Newsom's “insane" climate policies as the state’s prices at the pump soar significantly above the national average.

dailyNews.title: U.S. at Fault in Strike on School in Iran, Preliminary Inquiry Says
dailyNews.description: Outdated targeting data may have resulted in a mistaken missile strike, according to the ongoing military investigation, which undercuts President Trump’s assertion that Iran could be to blame.

dailyNews.title: How Trump and His Advisers Miscalculated Iran’s Response to War
dailyNews.description: In the lead-up to the U.S.-Israeli attack, President Trump downplayed the risks to the energy markets as a short-term concern that should not overshadow the mission to decapitate the Iranian regime.

dailyNews.title: How Trump Is Using the Paxton-Cornyn Race to Squeeze the Senate Over the SAVE Act
dailyNews.description: The president has yet to make an endorsement in the contest between John Cornyn and Ken Paxton as he tries to push the Senate to pass a bill requiring voters to show identification at the polls.

dailyNews.title: Republicans Concede They Need to Pivot on Immigration Before Midterms
dailyNews.description: In public comments and private meetings at a House G.O.P. retreat, top officials allowed that President Trump’s immigration crackdown had hurt the party and that they needed a course correction on the issue.

dailyNews.title: Trump Documents Missing in Epstein Files Highlight DOJ’s Missteps
dailyNews.description: In late July, an F.B.I. agent asked colleagues to get started on a sensitive task relating to Jeffrey Epstein, listing the names of 14 prominent men, with President Trump at the top.
